problems.diagnostic: Target (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port specifications directly; port names must be used as visible symbols in expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace all references to Target and Actual in the AGREE annex with their direct usage as port names

problems.diagnostic: Actual (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port specifications directly; port names must be used as visible symbols in expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace all references to Target and Actual in the AGREE annex with their direct usage as port names

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex block, ensure that Target and Actual are used directly as port names without any AADL type or package qualification
Verify that the AGREE expressions for e, e_dot, and e_int correctly reference the port names as visible symbols
Ensure that the guarantee statement correctly relates Actuator_Input to the computed values using only visible port names
